payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet front showing two recessed rectangular panels with a central vertical seam; the finish is slightly glossy with visible scuffs and small chips, a base molding is visible at the bottom, and the crop is partial/edge‑cropped (top and left cut off); appears to be a waist‑height storage cabinet seen from roughly 0.8 m away.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark brown wooden cabinet front","long_description":"Close-up of a dark brown wooden cabinet front showing two recessed rectangular panels with a central vertical seam; the finish is slightly glossy with visible scuffs and small chips, a base molding is visible at the bottom, and the crop is partial/edge‑cropped (top and left cut off); appears to be a waist‑height storage cabinet seen from roughly 0.8 m away.","attributes":["dark brown wood","two recessed panels","central vertical seam","glossy worn finish","scuff marks/chips","base molding","edge-cropped/partial","close-up view"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.8}
